q: The teacher praised the top students in front of the class, the principal praised the best performers in the school assembly, and the parents praised their children at home.

q: He painted the walls in blue, she painted the chairs in green, and their son painted the windows in white.
a: He painted the walls in blue, she the chairs in green, and their son the windows in white.
